creator: bbtruk@users.sourceforge.net
text:
Are you sure you are applying the patch in a clean checkout? The file "files/patch-src_platform_uosforms.pas" should not exists before patching, and the resulting file's checksum should be 794e2dbbc026f05190feca2ac380dc24580adf86494630e93799bd893fa47cb3.

I can't reproduce your results.
